title: Carepriced Operator Pricing Record
description: Single operator-level senior care pricing record with multi-source citation metadata. v1 (rev 2, locked 2026-05-06 per ALM-5482) — supports 5 care types (IL, AL, MC, SNF, home-care) and 5-source waterfall ingestion (CMS 2540-24 → state LTC licensing → operator websites → NIC MAP → CareScout/Genworth fallback). levelOfCareModifier is now a flat array of {key,label,multiplier} objects so the calculator can render ordered radio options without a label lookup table.

operatorId.description: Stable kebab-case slug. Format: <operator-name-slug> within a state:zip namespace.

operatorName.description: Operator's public-facing legal or DBA name.

careType.description: One of the 5 v1 care types. Multi-type operators emit multiple records (one per care type).

monthlyRate.description: Monthly rate band in USD. Required for IL/AL/MC/SNF. Null for home-care (use hourlyRate).

hourlyRate.description: Hourly rate band in USD. Required for home-care. Null for facility-based care types.

levelOfCareModifier.description: Ordered list of level-of-care options that act as multipliers on monthlyRate.median (or hourlyRate.median for home-care). Renders 1:1 as ordered radio buttons in the Carepriced calculator. The implicit baseline (multiplier 1.0) is added by the calculator UI as a 'Standard care' option above this array. v1 locked shape per ALM-5482 — replaces the prior object-map shape.

key.description: Stable kebab-case dev key (e.g. 'medium', 'high', 'memory-care', 'companion'). Stable across schema revs.

label.description: Human UX copy shown in calculator radio options (e.g. 'Higher needs (mobility / ADL help)').

multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to monthlyRate.median (or hourlyRate.median) when this level is selected.

lastVerified.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of last source confirmation. Displayed on every KB page.

sources.description: Citation chain. Order = priority (most authoritative first). Every record carries at least one source.

filingReference.description: Filing ID, CCN, or licensing reference number when no public URL exists.

metadata.description: Optional non-display metadata used by the pipeline (operator-website canonical URL, CCN, NPI, etc).
